videos.title: Bansko: SUPER SG podium
videos.description: Lindsey Vonn won the 2012 super G in Bansko, setting fire to the bottom half of the course but Tina Weirather nearly had her, taking second place just 0.05 back and Daniela Merighetti landed the first SG podium of her World Cup career 0.07 back on 26 Feb 2012.
videos.transcript:
yeah I had seen maretti and uh V roders
run um so I knew they skied really well
and I had a feeling that voder was was
going to win today so I was like okay
that's the standard I have to beat that
and so when I came to the finish and I
saw that I was ahead and I I thought you
know that should that should be enough
so I was excited V rer should be in the
top seven you know she's she was you
know third and or second in the last
Super G and she's been skiing amazing
all year so I knew I knew that she was
capable of being on the podium today and
um so when I saw her run I was like okay
that's it I know I made a big mistake in
my run but I'm really happy with the way
I ski the bottom part of the course and
I definitely took a lot of risk and uh
it paid off I I have the turbo I have
the turbo waiting in the wings in case I
need it it's been a little while since I
had my last win and was definitely
feeling like my energy was really low
you know just a lot of travel the last
couple weeks and
um I I I actually think I recovered
pretty well this week you know I got a
lot of sleep and I was like 10 11 hours
every day and and eating really well you
know I think that's something that's
really important and you know I just
didn't quite get the the food that I
needed the last couple weeks you know
being away from Central Europe you know
I mean I'm used to Austrian food and it
was definitely a lot different so I
finally feel better and um yesterday I
was really disappointed that we didn't
get to race because I felt like I had a
good a good feeling on this course but I
was also excited you know to have
another day off and and uh I actually
took a nap before I found that the race
was cancelled and I don't know I like
naps I like sleeping and I I think I'll
be ready for next week now well I think
um you really had to carve from the
beginning to the end of the turn you
couldn't slide one meter because uh it
was um the the snow was a bit aggressive
and so you had to to ski really clean
and that's what I tried I was at the
leader box and Lindsay came down and was
six uh T behind me at the last
intermediate time and I was really
hoping that I can beat her today but
again she was faster um yeah it's really
tight and I hope that someday I can beat
her has also to do with luck I mean it's
so tight that um I think I can be I
could be said about the second place but
I could also be fourth with uh 4 or 300
slower so I guess I have to be I have to
be happy yeah I tried to
push from the start at the bottom and I
did very good the the part at the top
and so I'm so happy today because it's
my first time in top three in super G2
and so with the people here around it's
so so nice difficult because it's very
fast here and you have to push is it's
fast and it's not so easy yeah we are so
close but it's okay

videos.title: Pirin Extreme 2020
videos.description:
Задръжте дъха си... новото трасе Pirin Extreme - 38K, с 3300м+! 
Регистрацията за Migu Run Skyrunner® World Series Pirin Extreme&Pirin Ultra 2020 е вече отворена!
През 2020 състезанието ще предложи  3 Трасета на участниците:
➡️ Трасе A - 160K, с 11000м+!
➡️ Трасе Б - 66K, с 4400м+!
➡️ Трасе C - с новото си име Pirin Extreme, с дължина 38К и 3300м+! Pirin Extreme ще е част от Световните серии по Скайрънинг! 
Посетете сайта на състезанието, регистрирайте се за участие и също така запазете своето настаняване на пълен пансион и трансфер! 👇
https://www.pirinultra.com/registration


-----
Hold your breath and get ready for a wild one... the new Pirin Extreme 2020 Route - 38K, with 3300m+! 
The registration for Migu Run Skyrunner® World Series Pirin Extreme&Pirin Ultra 2020 is now open!
In 2020 the race will offer 3 Routes to the participants:
➡️ Route A - by tradition it is the brutal 160K, with 11000m+!
➡️ Route B - 66K, with a 4400m+!
➡️ Route C - named Pirin Extreme, with 3300m+! Pirin Extreme is part of the Skyrunner World Series Visit the race website, sign for participation and book your full travel and accommodation service as well! 👇
https://www.en.pirinultra.com/registration


---
#pirinextreme #pirinultra2020 #pirinultra #runlikenoother
#skyrunning #pirinmountain

videos.title: 2022 Bansko Freeride World Qualifier 3* Highlights
videos.description:
#BanskoFreeride #Bansko #PirinMountain #Bulgaria #DropIn #FWQ

The first edition of Bansko Freeride World Qualifier offered amazing conditions, breathtaking riders’ performance, and tons of smiles and fun!🤘🇧🇬⛷🏂
Huge THANK YOU to all riders, co-workers and all fans that attended the event in the highest Fan Zone ever built in Bulgaria🤘🇧🇬 Thank you for following and supporting the freeride sport in Bulgaria! 👊

Follow Bansko Freeride World Qualifier
👉 https://www.instagram.com/bansko.freeride/
👉 https://www.facebook.com/bansko.freeride 

Follow the FWT:

👉 https://www.facebook.com/FreerideWorl...
